https://wtwcinemas.co.uk/film/street-fig.synopsis: In 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu and Ken Masters are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate and fury. https://wtwcinemas.co.uk/film/jackass-be.synopsis: The 5th and final installment to Jackass franchise where the crew go on one last insane crusade.

https://wtwcinemas.co.uk/film/wild-horse.synopsis: Shortly before the 1973 Chilean coup, CIA agents Chris and Lee are dispatched from Santiago to Easter Island by their bureau chief, MJ.
